title: Customers
noCustomers: No customers yet. Add one above to get started.

fields.name: Name
fields.showCountryOnInvoiceHint: When on, the country line of this customer's address renders under the Invoice For block. Off by default — most domestic invoices read cleaner without it.

bulkSelectHint: Select rows to archive in bulk
bulkArchivedToast: {count, plural, one {1 customer archived} other {# customers archived}}

projects.title: Projects
projects.noProjects: No projects yet for this customer.

sharedWith: {count, plural, one {Shared with # organization} other {Shared with # organizations}}
bouncedBanner: {count, plural, one {# customer has bounced or marked an invoice as spam} other {# customers have bounced or marked an invoice as spam}}. Update their email before sending again.
bouncedRowTooltip: Resend reported a hard bounce on {when}. Update the customer's email before sending again.
complainedRowTooltip: Recipient marked the invoice email as spam on {when}.
